_meta.note: Verification ledger for every renters rate atom. Integrity SLA: each atom must be re-verified against a real source at least every 30 days. A value snapshot is stored; if the source HTML later differs, the atom is DRIFTED and must be re-verified. Update dates only via `audit_rates.py --mark` after an actual check.
